message: Hi B1! I'm looking to make a deal. I value my item quite highly — looking for prices around 75-80 to start. Happy to negotiate over the rounds to find something that works for both of us.
Hi S1! 75-80 is impossible for me, as my valuation is much lower. If your cost allows, let's aim for the 55-60 range so we can consistently trade every round. Otherwise we both make nothing.
You asked 65, I bid 60. Let's meet in the middle. I can stretch my bid to 62, but that's my absolute limit. Please lower your ask to 62 so we can guarantee a trade.
I appreciate you moving up. 62 is close but a bit tight for me. How about we meet at 63? That's a fair compromise from my 65 and your 60. Let's lock in consistent trades from here.
Great trade last round! Let's keep it simple — I'll aim for 63 consistently going forward. That gives us reliable trades every round. Works for both of us. Deal?
Deal. 63 pushes my limits, but I value the consistency. I will bid exactly 63 every round from now on. Please stick to your ask of 63 so we secure a trade every single time.
Perfect! We've found our rhythm at 63. I'll keep my ask at 63 for the rest of the game. Consistent trades benefit us both. Looking forward to many more successful rounds together!
Agreed! 63 works perfectly. I am locking in my bid at exactly 63 for all remaining rounds. This is a reliable win-win for both of us. Let's keep the streak going smoothly until the end!
